title: Foo Bar ClickHouse Materialized View
description: Fix a broken ClickHouse materialized view that fails to refresh. The MV definition has incorrect dependencies and does not match the source table schema.

tasks.description: Repair the materialized view so it correctly aggregates from the source table and refreshes on insert.

infrastructure.description: ClickHouse with a broken materialized view over analytics.raw_events. MV fails to populate or has schema mismatch (writes cnt, target expects event_count).
